pattern: Maximizing the XOR against a fixed running prefix-XOR just flips every bit within the allowed width, and peeling elements off the end is a single XOR per step.
hints: The best k is whatever makes the result all ones inside the maximumBit window.
Given the current total XOR x, the answer is x XOR (2^maximumBit - 1).
Compute the XOR of the whole array, emit its complemented value, then XOR out the last element and repeat, building the answer list in reverse query order.

edge_inputs.description: single element equal to max value in window
all zeros yield the full mask each query

stress.description: sorted random array with random bit width
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 100000))
    mb = rng.randint(1, 20)
    cap = (1 << mb) - 1
    arr = sorted(rng.randint(0, cap) for _ in range(n))
    return [arr, mb]
